top_signals.title: Iran warns Bulgaria against aiding US military operations
top_signals.summary: Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman warned Bulgaria on Tuesday against allowing the U.S. to use its territory for military operations against Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tehran's Hormuz threat risks global fallout, Rubio warns as U.S. strikes Iran for 11th straight night
top_signals.summary: His comments come as U.S. Central Command hit Iranian targets for an 11th straight night.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Big bond investors fear being stung by the next ‘widow-maker trade’
top_signals.summary: Sharp rise in government debt yields lures some traders but many remain wary of fiscal outlook
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says this old-school investing concept still wins — even in the AI boom
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer urged investors to diversify beyond the market's hottest AI winners, warning that no single investment theme should dominate a portfolio.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea crypto volumes shrink as retail investors shift to stocks
top_signals.summary: Trading activity on South Korea’s five major crypto exchanges fell sharply as the KOSPI surged, signaling a shift in retail investors toward equities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New British prime minister gains early defense win with Canada fighter jet tie-up
top_signals.summary: Canada has joined the GCAP fighter program as an observer, marking the first expansion beyond the founding members Britain, Italy and Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Critical wp2shell WordPress flaws exploited to install webshells
top_signals.summary: Hackers are exploiting the "wp2shell" critical vulnerability suite (CVE-2026-63030 and CVE-2026-60137) affecting WordPress Core to deploy persistent webshells and install malicious plugins on affected servers. [...]

top_signals.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued a postmortem on a data leak in which a contractor published dozens of internal CISA credentials -- including AWS Govcloud keys -- in a public GitHub repository for almost six months before being notified by KrebsOnSecurity. Experts say the gaps identified in the agency's initial response provide important lessons that all security teams should absorb.
